arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand hails 'world class' Bukayo Saka and tips him to 'decide matches for the rest of his career' after starring against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Saka bounced back from a glaring penalty miss in the first half to score at the Bernabeu and confirm his side's spot in the semi-finals.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta targets Champions League glory after Arsenal knock out Real Madrid
arts.sum: The Gunners won 2-1 in the Bernabeu to clinch a 5-1 aggregate victory over the holders.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta's nine-word response to beating Real Madrid says everything for Arsenal boss
arts.sum: Arsenal have booked their place in the Champions League semi-finals for the first time in 16 years with a stunning win against Real Madrid and Gunners boss Mikel Arteta has given his verdict

arts.ttl: Myles Lewis-Skelly pokes fun at Antonio Rudiger after Real Madrid defender got away with STAMP on teenage star during Arsenal's Champions League triumph
arts.sum: Myles Lewis-Skelly took to social media to poke fun at Real Madrid defender Antonio Rudiger after Arsenal's 2-1 win in the Champions League over Los Blancos on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “My future? I don’t know, and I don’t want to know”
arts.sum: It happens to us less often than to others, but we still need to know how to deal with it so we can come back stronger. Hopes of a remontada - a comeback - were on everyone’s lips ahead of the whistle, but the toothless version of Real Madrid turned up and in the end, it was just too easy for Arteta’s side.

arts.ttl: Arsenal player ratings vs Real Madrid as Rice and Saka star in huge win
arts.sum: Then came the goals, Bukayo Saka with the first chipping the ball over Courtois before minutes later William Saliba gave the ball away to Vinicius Jr who scored an open goal. Arsenal had the chance to take an early lead through Bukayo Saka after Mikel Merino won a penalty for the visitors.

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Rio Ferdinand wants Myles Lewis Skelly's passport checked after keeping Real Madrid quiet
arts.sum: The teenager continues to break new ground, this time at the Bernabeu

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Arsenal highlights: Martinelli and Saka goals secure historic Bernabeu win
arts.sum: Hello and welcome to football.london for live coverage of Arsenal's Champions League match with Real Madrid. You can follow live coverage from the Santiago Bernabeu Stadium throughout the day right here with our dedicated coverage.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “I don’t know about my future, and I don’t want to know”
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti spoke to the media after their 2-1 loss to Arsenal in the Champions League . This year wasn’t the case; in sports, this can happen; there are no invincible teams.

arts.ttl: Arteta praises Arsenal's 'maturity' after victory over Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arsenal head coach Mikel Arteta praises his sides "maturity" after beating Real Madrid 2-1 in the Bernabeu to reach the Champions League semi-finals.
